actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You should be careful not to step on anyone's toes as you move

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You can do it alone, but making real progress often requires the help of another

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You can't bring someone along on your journey unless they agree to spend that time with you

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Someone usually has to lead on the path, and someone else can follow and help

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The rewards from a journey can strengthen the relationship between those who made it

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It takes courage to make that first step onto the dance floor, but others may soon follow

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Sometimes even a slight misstep can cause you to lose the rhythm and your momentum

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You have to learn the basics before you can start your own routines

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you want to move forward, sometimes a trusted partner has to agree to temporarily move back

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: No journey lasts forever, and eventually you have to play one last sad, but sweet, slow song

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: It can be hard to move forward if your chosen venue is too crowded, sometimes you need to find an open field.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: No one succeeds alone, and it often takes more than two to tango
